user_stories.benefit: the clinic can review my preferred time
acceptance_criteria: The request form collects display name, preferred date, preferred time, appointment type, and optional administrative reason.
A successful submission creates a request with Pending Review status.
The website warns users not to enter real patient records.

user_stories.benefit: the receptionist can review scheduling risks before confirmation
acceptance_criteria: If an active request already uses the same date and time, the new request is marked with conflict=true.
Conflicted requests are still created but remain Pending Review.
Cancelled requests do not block future slots.
The receptionist can change a Pending Review request to Confirmed.
The receptionist can change a request to Cancelled.
The system records a review note and review timestamp.

user_stories.benefit: I can understand the request without receiving unsafe medical advice
acceptance_criteria: The summary includes appointment type, date, time, and current status.
The summary explicitly states that it is non-diagnostic.
The summary does not provide treatment advice.

user_stories.goal: test and deploy the generated system
user_stories.benefit: the coursework provides evidence of CI/CD and deployment practice
acceptance_criteria: The project includes automated API tests.
The project includes a GitHub Actions workflow.
The project includes Render deployment configuration.
